'''''RS-32''''' was an [[XQ4 Platform]] space installation used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It housed the [[Mag-pulse warhead/Legends|magnetic pulse]] warhead technology.

==History==
The space station came under attack by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. Despite fighter defenses of [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95s]] and [[R60 T-wing interceptor|T-wings]], and Rebel assistance from two [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvettes]] called [[Rampart (Assassin-class)|''Rampart'']], [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]], [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptors]], and [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]], the station was captured, and the technology fell into Imperial hands.

However, the Imperials were not able to hold the station for long, as [[Demetrius Zaarin]]'s forces made a surprise attack and [[Destruction of the Grappler|destroyed]] the facility.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
